title: Stir Fry with Grilled Vegetables
description: A flavorful stir fry dish made with a variety of grilled vegetables and served with a side of steamed rice. This vegan recipe is perfect for a quick and easy meal.

ingredients.name: Bell Peppers
ingredients.notes: Any color bell pepper works well for this recipe.

ingredients.name: Onions
ingredients.notes: You can use any type of onion, but yellow onions work best.

ingredients.name: Mushrooms
ingredients.notes: You can use any variety of mushroom, but button mushrooms work well.

ingredients.name: Fresh Basil
ingredients.notes: You can use fresh or dried basil for this recipe.

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: You can use fresh or dried garlic for this recipe.

ingredients.name: Rice
ingredients.notes: You can use any type of rice for this recipe.

ingredients.name: Soy Sauce
ingredients.notes: You can use any type of soy sauce for this recipe.

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: You can use any type of oil for this recipe.

instructions: Begin by preheating your grill to medium-high heat.
Grill the bell peppers, onions, and mushrooms for 5-7 minutes on each side, or until they are tender.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes, or until fragrant.
Add the soy sauce and stir to combine.
Add the grilled vegetables and stir to combine.
Serve the stir fry over steamed rice and garnish with fresh basil.
